calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arb Award;
Off Calendar Nov-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alvin Hui (408.656.8698) son in law of and appearing on behalf of respondent

No other appearances. This matter was not argued. PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is granted. No opposition filed. Mr. Hui's request for a continuance was denied. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney; Court Reporter: Wendy Pun, CSR #12891
